info.name: DynDisc2-MultiContract-AR-AP-Cash-timeepoch-mulfun-3
info.description: 10-contract AR/AP dynamic discounting — 8 early-settle (LINEAR/EXPONENTIAL/STEPWISE) + 2 penalty (20%). Penalty trigger = settlementDate > dueDate only. No cross-contract cash pool. No BUYER_CASH_ZERO trick.

item.name: 1 - Reference Indices
item.description: BUYER_CASH_01 (flat $500k) and HURDLE_RATE_01. BUYER_CASH_ZERO removed — penalty now driven by settlementDate only.

item.name: 2 - Penalty Accrual Models
Add penalty_ar_003 (AR-INV-003 STEPWISE, due Apr-17, settle Apr-28)
Add penalty_ap_004 (AP-INV-004 STEPWISE, due Apr-21, settle May-05)

item.description: penalty_ar_003 (AR-INV-003, due Apr-17, settle Apr-28, 11d overdue) and penalty_ap_004 (AP-INV-004, due Apr-21, settle May-05, 14d overdue). Trigger = settlementDate > dueDate.

item.name: 3 - Early Settlement Models
item.description: 8 contracts with early settlementDate <= dueDate. AR-INV-003 and AP-INV-004 have no earlySettlementModel — they go direct to penalty track.

item.name: 4 - Scenarios
item.description: One scenario per contract. Penalty scenarios use PenaltyAccrual risk factor only. No CASH_RESERVE reference index.

item.name: 5 - Simulations (ACTUS)
Simulate CASH-RESERVE-001 [CSH initial $1000 — opens reserve, no discount/penalty]

exec: console.log('EVENTS   : ' + r.events.length + ' (CSH always returns empty — correct ACTUS behaviour)');
console.log('RESERVE  : $1,000.00 established as opening balance at IED 2026-02-05');
pm.test('CSH events array is empty (correct)', function () { pm.expect(r.events.length).to.eql(0); });

item.name: Simulate AR-INV-001 [LINEAR early settle Feb-28 → PP=$493.00 saving=$7.00]

exec: var data = pm.response.json(); var r = data[0]; var events = r.events;
var line = '  [' + e.type + ']  ' + e.time + '  payoff=' + e.payoff.toFixed(4) + '  nomVal=' + e.nominalValue.toFixed(2);
if (e.type === 'MD' && e.payoff === 0) line += '  ← MD=$0 confirms early settle complete';

item.name: Simulate AR-INV-002 [EXPONENTIAL early settle Mar-09 → PP=$570.64 saving=$29.36]

exec: var data = pm.response.json(); var r = data[0]; var events = r.events;
console.log('DISCOUNT : EXPONENTIAL  maxRate=5%  λ=0.05  settle=2026-03-09  due=2026-03-26');
var line = '  [' + e.type + ']  ' + e.time + '  payoff=' + e.payoff.toFixed(4) + '  nomVal=' + e.nominalValue.toFixed(2);
if (e.type === 'MD' && e.payoff === 0) line += '  ← MD=$0 confirms early settle complete';

item.name: Simulate AR-INV-003 [PENALTY settle Apr-28, 11d overdue → inflow=$452.48 penalty=$2.48]

exec: var data = pm.response.json(); var r = data[0]; var events = r.events;
var line = '  [' + e.type + ']  ' + e.time + '  payoff=' + e.payoff.toFixed(4) + '  nomVal=' + e.nominalValue.toFixed(2);
if (e.type === 'MD' && e.payoff > 0) line += '  ← face $450 at maturity (penalty computed client-side)';
if (e.type === 'PP') line += '  ← monitoring event (payoff=0, penalty not in ACTUS engine)';
pm.test('AR-INV-003 MD payoff = $450 (face at maturity)', function () { pm.expect(Math.abs(md.payoff - 450.0)).to.be.below(0.01); });
pm.test('AR-INV-003 all PP monitoring payoffs = 0', function () { ppEvents.forEach(function(e){ pm.expect(e.payoff).to.eql(0); }); });

if (e.type === 'MD' && e.payoff === 0) line += '  ← MD=$0 confirms early settle complete';

item.name: Simulate AR-INV-005 [EXPONENTIAL early settle Apr-08 → PP=$456.76 saving=$23.24]

exec: var data = pm.response.json(); var r = data[0]; var events = r.events;
console.log('DISCOUNT : EXPONENTIAL  maxRate=5%  λ=0.08  settle=2026-04-08  due=2026-04-26');
var line = '  [' + e.type + ']  ' + e.time + '  payoff=' + e.payoff.toFixed(4) + '  nomVal=' + e.nominalValue.toFixed(2);
if (e.type === 'MD' && e.payoff === 0) line += '  ← MD=$0 confirms early settle complete';

item.name: Simulate AP-INV-001 [LINEAR early settle Mar-03 → paid=$394.00 saving=$6.00]

exec: var data = pm.response.json(); var r = data[0]; var events = r.events;
console.log('RPL NOTE : PP.payoff=0 (timing marker only). MD.payoff=full face.');
console.log('           Client must apply discount: $400×(1-0.015)=$394.00 actual outflow');
var line = '  [' + e.type + ']  ' + e.time + '  payoff=' + e.payoff.toFixed(4) + '  nomVal=' + e.nominalValue.toFixed(2);
if (e.type === 'PP') line += '  ← settlement trigger (PP=0 for RPL; discount applied at MD)';
if (e.type === 'MD') line += '  ← full face discharged; net outflow=$394.00 after discount';
pm.test('AP-INV-001 MD payoff = face $400 (RPL convention)', function () { pm.expect(Math.abs(md.payoff - (-400))).to.be.below(0.01); });

item.name: Simulate AP-INV-002 [STEPWISE early settle Mar-25 → paid=$490.00 saving=$10.00]

exec: var data = pm.response.json(); var r = data[0]; var events = r.events;
console.log('RPL NOTE : PP.payoff=0 (timing marker only). MD.payoff=full face.');
console.log('           Client must apply discount: $500×(1-0.02)=$490.00 actual outflow');
var line = '  [' + e.type + ']  ' + e.time + '  payoff=' + e.payoff.toFixed(4) + '  nomVal=' + e.nominalValue.toFixed(2);
if (e.type === 'PP') line += '  ← settlement trigger (PP=0 for RPL)';
if (e.type === 'MD') line += '  ← full face; net outflow=$490.00 after 2% STEPWISE discount';
pm.test('AP-INV-002 MD payoff = face $500 (RPL convention)', function () { pm.expect(Math.abs(md.payoff - (-500))).to.be.below(0.01); });

item.name: Simulate AP-INV-003 [EXPONENTIAL early settle Mar-07 → paid=$332.95 saving=$17.05]

exec: var data = pm.response.json(); var r = data[0]; var events = r.events;
console.log('DISCOUNT : EXPONENTIAL  maxRate=5%  λ=0.06  settle=2026-03-07  due=2026-03-24');
console.log('RPL NOTE : PP.payoff=0 (timing marker only). MD.payoff=full face.');
console.log('           Client must apply discount: $350×(1-0.048717)=$332.95 actual outflow');
var line = '  [' + e.type + ']  ' + e.time + '  payoff=' + e.payoff.toFixed(4) + '  nomVal=' + e.nominalValue.toFixed(2);
if (e.type === 'PP') line += '  ← settlement trigger (PP=0 for RPL)';
if (e.type === 'MD') line += '  ← full face; net outflow=$332.95 after 4.8717% EXP discount';
pm.test('AP-INV-003 MD payoff = face $350 (RPL convention)', function () { pm.expect(Math.abs(md.payoff - (-350))).to.be.below(0.01); });

item.name: Simulate AP-INV-004 [PENALTY settle May-05, 14d overdue → outflow=$604.20 penalty=$4.20]

exec: var data = pm.response.json(); var r = data[0]; var events = r.events;
var line = '  [' + e.type + ']  ' + e.time + '  payoff=' + e.payoff.toFixed(4) + '  nomVal=' + e.nominalValue.toFixed(2);
if (e.type === 'MD') line += '  ← full face $600 at maturity (penalty computed client-side)';
if (e.type === 'PP') line += '  ← monitoring event (payoff=0, penalty not in ACTUS engine)';
pm.test('AP-INV-004 MD payoff = face $600 (penalty track)', function () { pm.expect(Math.abs(md.payoff - (-600))).to.be.below(0.01); });
pm.test('AP-INV-004 all PP monitoring payoffs = 0', function () { ppEvents.forEach(function(e){ pm.expect(Math.abs(e.payoff)).to.eql(0); }); });

item.name: Simulate AP-INV-005 [STEPWISE early settle Apr-17 → paid=$413.70 saving=$6.30]

exec: var data = pm.response.json(); var r = data[0]; var events = r.events;
console.log('RPL NOTE : PP.payoff=0 (timing marker only). MD.payoff=full face.');
console.log('           Client must apply discount: $420×(1-0.015)=$413.70 actual outflow');
var line = '  [' + e.type + ']  ' + e.time + '  payoff=' + e.payoff.toFixed(4) + '  nomVal=' + e.nominalValue.toFixed(2);
if (e.type === 'PP') line += '  ← settlement trigger (PP=0 for RPL)';
if (e.type === 'MD') line += '  ← full face; net outflow=$413.70 after 1.5% STEPWISE discount';
pm.test('AP-INV-005 MD payoff = face $420 (RPL convention)', function () { pm.expect(Math.abs(md.payoff - (-420))).to.be.below(0.01); });

item.description: PAM simulations at port 8083. AR role=RPA, AP role=RPL. Each simulation is self-contained — no cross-contract state.
